headline: Regions Financial (RF) Could Be 2% Below Fair Value As Digital Banking Push Continues
summary: Regions Financial (RF) is in focus after subsidiary Regions Bank introduced personalized insights, a mobile app feature that analyzes real-time account activity to deliver tailored financial education, alerts, and spending and savings insights for customers. See our latest analysis for Regions Financial. At a share price of $30.92, Regions Financial’s recent digital and leadership updates come alongside a 30 day share price return of 5.64% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 33.83%, with...

headline: NII, Fee Income Growth to Aid Regions Financial's Q2 Earnings
summary: RF's Q2 results are likely to reflect higher NII and fee income, with earnings and revenues expected to rise y/y as investors watch expenses and credit trends.
